subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! We have hearkened unto thy call, and revealed unto thee the horizon of Our knowledge, and made mention of thee with that which shall cause thy remembrance to endure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ا ح م د انا اسمعناک ندائی و اریناک افق عرفانی و ذکرناک بما یبقی به ذکرک بدوام
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
